title: Amazing Skies
description: This texture pack will completely overhaul the skies and weather once completed.
body:
This texture pack will completaly overhaul the envivoment in minecraft once completed, this pack is a long term project and I do not know when it will be finished, for me its just a side project right now. Currently this texture pack adds nicer end flashes, and an improved end sky, and will include inproved/more realistc rain, clouds and snow, in a future update, the goal of this project it to inprove the ambient effets in Minecraft significantly, once completed.

#    Feautures:

-    Better end flashes
  
-    Inproved end sky

#    Planned Features:
   
-    Better Rain
  
-    Better Snow
  
-    Particle overhauls
